title: Lateral Movement: Account Authenticating from Multiple Sources
description: Detects a single account performing network logons (LogonType 3) from 3+ distinct source IPs — indicates lateral movement sweep or compromised credential reuse.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' = '4624' and 'Logon Type' = '3' and not (User = 'ANONYMOUS LOGON' or User = '-') and not (User like '*$') | stats distinctcount('Source Address') as UniqueSources, count as TotalLogons by User, Entity | where UniqueSources > 3 | sort -UniqueSources
falsepositives: Domain admin accounts from multiple workstations
